name: Midjourney
description: Leading AI image generator known for artistic quality. Operates via Discord and web interface.
description_zh: 以艺术品质著称的领先AI图像生成器，通过Discord和网页界面操作。

name: DALL-E 3
description: OpenAI's image generation model integrated into ChatGPT, known for prompt accuracy and coherent text in images.
description_zh: OpenAI的图像生成模型，集成于ChatGPT，以提示准确性和图像内连贯文本著称。

name: Stable Diffusion
description: Open-source image generation model that can run locally. Huge community ecosystem with thousands of fine-tuned models.
description_zh: 可在本地运行的开源图像生成模型，拥有庞大的社区生态系统和数千个微调模型。

name: Flux
description: State-of-the-art open image generation model family (FLUX.1) from the original Stable Diffusion creators.
description_zh: 来自Stable Diffusion原班人马的最先进开源图像生成模型系列（FLUX.1）。

name: Ideogram
description: AI image generator especially strong at rendering accurate, stylized text within images.
description_zh: AI图像生成器，特别擅长在图像中渲染准确、风格化的文本。

name: Sora
description: OpenAI's text-to-video model capable of generating realistic and imaginative scenes up to 1 minute long.
description_zh: OpenAI的文本转视频模型，可生成长达1分钟的真实且富有想象力的场景。

name: Runway Gen-3 Alpha
description: Professional-grade AI video generation with strong motion consistency. Popular in film and creative industries.
description_zh: 专业级AI视频生成，运动一致性强，在电影和创意产业中广受欢迎。

name: Kling AI
description: High-quality video generation model from Kuaishou with realistic physics simulation and 5-second to 2-minute outputs.
description_zh: 快手的高质量视频生成模型，具有逼真的物理模拟，输出时长5秒至2分钟。

name: Hailuo AI (MiniMax)
description: AI video generation from MiniMax known for cinematic quality and realistic human motion.
description_zh: MiniMax的AI视频生成，以电影级画质和逼真的人物动作著称。

name: ElevenLabs
description: Best-in-class AI voice cloning and text-to-speech. Supports 32 languages with natural-sounding output.
description_zh: 一流的AI语音克隆和文本转语音技术，支持32种语言，输出自然。

name: Suno
description: AI music generation from text prompts. Creates full songs with vocals, instruments, and lyrics.
description_zh: 基于文本提示的AI音乐生成，可创作包含人声、乐器和歌词的完整歌曲。

name: Udio
description: AI music generation with high fidelity and fine-grained control over style, mood, and instrumentation.
description_zh: 高保真AI音乐生成，可精细控制风格、情绪和乐器编排。

name: Perplexity AI
description: AI-powered search engine that synthesizes real-time web results into cited, conversational answers.
description_zh: AI驱动的搜索引擎，将实时网络结果综合成带引用的对话式答案。

name: GitHub Copilot
description: The original AI coding assistant. Inline completions, chat, PR summaries, and agent-mode code edits.
description_zh: 最初的AI编程助手，提供内联补全、聊天、PR摘要和代理模式代码编辑。

name: Codeium
description: Free AI coding assistant with completions and chat. Supports 70+ languages and all major IDEs.
description_zh: 免费的AI编程助手，支持补全和聊天，兼容70多种语言及所有主流IDE。

name: ChatGPT
description: The world's most popular AI assistant. Supports conversation, file analysis, image generation, web browsing, and code execution.
description_zh: 全球最受欢迎的AI助手，支持对话、文件分析、图像生成、网页浏览和代码执行。

name: Claude.ai
description: Anthropic's conversational AI known for nuanced reasoning, long context (200K tokens), and strong coding/writing ability.
description_zh: Anthropic的对话AI，以细致推理、长上下文（20万词元）和强大的编程/写作能力著称。

name: Notion AI
description: AI writing and knowledge management built into Notion. Summarizes docs, drafts content, answers questions about your workspace.
description_zh: 集成于Notion的AI写作和知识管理工具，可总结文档、起草内容、回答工作区问题。

name: AutoGPT
description: The original autonomous AI agent. Sets goals and executes multi-step tasks using GPT models. Pioneered the agentic AI movement.
pricing: Open source (self-host free) · Cloud plan available
description_zh: 最初的自主AI代理，能设定目标并使用GPT模型执行多步骤任务，开创了代理式AI运动。

name: CrewAI
description: Framework for orchestrating role-playing autonomous AI agents. Define crews of specialized agents that collaborate to complete complex tasks.
description_zh: 编排角色扮演自主AI代理的框架，可定义专业代理团队协作完成复杂任务。

name: LangChain
description: The most widely used framework for building LLM-powered applications and agents. Connects LLMs to tools, memory, and data sources.
description_zh: 构建LLM应用和代理的最广泛使用框架，连接LLM与工具、记忆和数据源。

name: n8n
description: Open-source workflow automation with native AI agent nodes. Build agentic pipelines visually with 400+ integrations. Self-hostable.
description_zh: 开源工作流自动化工具，内置AI代理节点，可通过400多个集成可视化构建代理管道，可自托管。

name: OpenClaw
description: Self-hosted AI agent deployment platform. Deploy and manage autonomous AI bots with full control over API keys and data. Basis for the Claw ecosystem (ClawShip, IronClaw, etc.).
description_zh: 自托管AI代理部署平台，可部署和管理自主AI机器人，完全控制API密钥和数据，是Claw生态系统（ClawShip、IronClaw等）的基础。

name: Dify
description: Open-source LLM app development platform. Build chatbots, agents, and RAG pipelines with a visual workflow editor. 100K+ GitHub stars.
pricing: Open source (self-host) · Cloud free tier · Pro $59/mo
description_zh: 开源LLM应用开发平台，通过可视化工作流编辑器构建聊天机器人、代理和RAG管道，GitHub星标超10万。

name: AgentOps
description: Observability and monitoring platform for AI agents. Track every LLM call, tool use, and agent action with session replays and cost analytics.
description_zh: AI代理的可观测性和监控平台，跟踪每次LLM调用、工具使用和代理操作，提供会话回放和成本分析。

name: Jasper
description: Enterprise AI writing platform for marketing teams. Generates on-brand copy, blog posts, ads, and social content at scale.
description_zh: 面向营销团队的企业级AI写作平台，大规模生成符合品牌风格的文案、博客文章、广告和社交媒体内容。

name: Copy.ai
description: AI-powered GTM platform for sales and marketing copy. Generates emails, ads, product descriptions, and social posts.
description_zh: 面向销售和营销文案的AI驱动GTM平台，生成电子邮件、广告、产品描述和社交媒体帖子。

name: Grammarly
description: AI writing assistant for grammar, clarity, tone, and style. Integrates into browsers, Office, Google Docs, and IDEs.
description_zh: AI写作助手，优化语法、清晰度、语气和风格，集成于浏览器、Office、Google Docs和IDE。

name: Quillbot
description: AI paraphrasing, summarization, and grammar checking tool with 9 writing modes. Widely used by students and academic writers.
description_zh: AI改写、总结和语法检查工具，提供9种写作模式，广泛用于学生和学术写作者。

name: Sudowrite
description: AI writing tool built specifically for fiction and creative writing. Story generation, brainstorming, rewriting, and 'wormhole' mode for expanding scenes.
description_zh: 专为小说和创意写作设计的AI写作工具，支持故事生成、头脑风暴、重写及扩展场景的'虫洞'模式。

name: Wordtune
description: AI writing companion that rewrites and improves sentences in real time. Adjusts tone (casual/formal), length, and style with one click.
description_zh: AI写作伴侣，实时重写和改进句子，一键调整语气（随意/正式）、长度和风格。

name: Writesonic
description: AI content platform for blogs, SEO articles, ads, and landing pages. Includes Chatsonic (web-connected AI chat) and Audiosonic.
description_zh: 面向博客、SEO文章、广告和落地页的AI内容平台，包含Chatsonic（联网AI聊天）和Audiosonic。
